chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No.S-31 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections. 2.For hearing of main case 22-04-2024 Mr. Abdul Sattar Mahesar, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G for the State. O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J., Applicant is petitioner in Crl. Misc. Application No.92 of 2024 filed for registration of FIR against proposed accused/respondents No.4 to 6, pending before II-Additional Sessions Judge/ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Khairpur and is seeking its transfer from the said Court to another Court on the ground that SHO is a brother of said Judge and subordinate to proposed accused/ respondent No.6. Learned Additional P.G has given no objection. Accordingly, above Crl. Misc. Application is withdrawn from the file of II-Additional Sessions Judge, Khairpur and transferred to the Court of learned Sessions Judge, Khairpur for disposal in accordance with law. This Crl. Misc. Application is accordingly disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
